message:
fix(patches): Change hnsw_rs edition 2024 → 2021 for stable Rust

The edition 2024 feature is not stabilized in Cargo 1.83.0 and requires
nightly Rust. Changed to edition 2021 for compatibility with stable toolchain
used in CI.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,7 @@ readme = "README.md"
 keywords = ["algorithms", "ann", "hnsw"]
 repository = "https://github.com/jean-pierreBoth/hnswlib-rs"
 documentation = "https://docs.rs/hnsw_rs"
-edition = "2024"
+edition = "2021"
 
 
 # declare a feature with no dependancy to get some modulated debug print
